## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Unit/contract tests pass
- [ ] Example manifests validate
- [ ] Evidence ledger validates
- [ ] New provider input is pinned and checksum-verified
- [ ] Destructive behavior remains dry-run by default
- [ ] Licensing and third-party notices were reviewed

## Capability claims

List affected claim IDs. A claim may move to `verified` only when the required
public workflow, report, timestamp, environment, and artifact digest exist.
